ItacAcademyItem.Name: Rischiarati - Siena (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Vat full of grapes fermenting and purifying
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: See Maylender, V, p. 14, for sources on this Academy
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
